final_answer: COVID-19 spreads primarily through respiratory droplets and aerosols released from an infected person’s mouth or nose when they cough, sneeze, speak, sing, or breathe; these particles can be inhaled or land on a nearby person’s face, and the virus can also be transmitted when a person touches surfaces contaminated with the virus and then touches their eyes, nose, or mouth. Infected individuals can be contagious even without showing symptoms. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00003] [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00005]
